text:
Once upon a time there was a boy named Sammy. Sammy loved everything nature had to offer. Birds sang. Leaves fluttered. Stars twinkled. That was his favorite thing about nights.

One night Sammy woke up cold and hungry. He sneaked downstairs. There was an old apple tree! He grabbed an apple. They tasted like everything good. Afterwards, Sammy decided maybe tonight would be a good night to talk to Olga.

Her house was kind of spooky. You could hear things that weren't there. But she lived there alone. Perhaps talking would convince her she wasn't as crazy as everybody thought.

Sammy leaned against her door. Quietly, he invited her out. They walked. Stars came out. Owls hooted.

Olga smiled.

Maybe her mom hadn't forgotten about her.

Maybe life smelled nice.

Maybe love wasn't absurd.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
